title: astragalus lunatus
intro: Astragalus lunatus, also known as the yellow milk vetch, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus lunatus include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus lunatus can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, to support overall well-being and promote longevity.
